purpose: Provides structural support and positioning for machine components while managing thermal expansion stresses

outputs.name: door_closed_status
outputs.description: Status indicating if door is closed

states.name: thermal_expansion_stress
states.description: Accumulated stress from thermal expansion and contraction cycles

states.name: mounting_joint_integrity
states.description: Structural integrity of mounting connections affected by thermal cycling

events.name: excessive_connection_stress
events.description: Damage to module connections from improper support

events.name: thermal_expansion_constraint
events.description: Restriction of thermal expansion during operation

parameters.name: stress_accumulation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of thermal stress accumulation per unit movement

parameters.name: thermal_cycling_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for mounting joint degradation

parameters.name: critical_integrity_threshold
parameters.description: Critical threshold for mounting joint integrity

parameters.name: stress_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Warning threshold for thermal expansion stress

parameters.name: position_scale_factor
parameters.description: Scale factor for converting movement to position

parameters.name: door_position_threshold
parameters.description: Position threshold for door closed status

state_transition_logic: thermal_expansion_stress increases by stress_accumulation_rate * (abs(boat_speed) + abs(oscillation_speed)) * dt
mounting_joint_integrity decreases by (1.0 / thermal_cycling_timescale) * (thermal_expansion_stress / max_allowable_stress) * dt
output_logic: boat_position is calculated by integrating boat_speed over time, scaled by position_scale_factor and modified by mounting_joint_integrity
door_closed_status is 'on' when boat_position is less than door_position_threshold, otherwise 'off'
event_logic: excessive_connection_stress occurs when thermal_expansion_stress exceeds stress_warning_threshold
thermal_expansion_constraint occurs when mounting_joint_integrity falls below critical_integrity_threshold
assumptions: Thermal expansion stress accumulates proportionally to movement speeds
Joint integrity degrades based on accumulated thermal stress
Door status is determined by boat position relative to a threshold
Mounting hardware operates in normal thermal cycling conditions
